# Nishad Beej Bhandar (निषाद बीज भंडार)

Online catalog, agricultural product distributor, and crop advisory service operated by Abhay Nishad (B.Sc Agriculture) based in Rampur, Uttar Pradesh, India.

## Contact Information
- **Owner/Specialist:** Abhay Nishad (अभय निषाद)
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91-6387634500
- **Location:** Near Agriculture Office, Main Market Road, Rampur, Uttar Pradesh, India (PIN: 274204)
- **Store Hours:** Monday - Sunday, 08:00 AM - 08:00 PM

---

## Website Structure & Core Routes

### Public Pages
- **Homepage (`/`)**: Main landing page highlighting store features, seasonal crop calendars (Kharif, Rabi, Zaid), customer testimonials, and an enquiry/advisory submission form.
- **Product Catalog (`/products`)**: Browse all seeds, fertilizers, and pesticides. Includes category filters:
  - `paddy-seeds` (धान के बीज)
  - `wheat-seeds` (गेहूं के बीज)
  - `maize-seeds` (मक्का के बीज)
  - `vegetable-seeds` (सब्जी के बीज)
  - `mustard-seeds` (सरसों के बीज)
  - `pulse-seeds` (दलहन के बीज)
  - `fertilizers` (खाद एवं उर्वरक)
  - `pesticides` (कीटनाशक दवाइयाँ)
  - `plant-growth-promoters` (ग्रोथ प्रमोटर / टॉनिक)
- **Product Details (`/products/[id]?type=[seed|fertilizer|pesticide]`)**: View product specs (price, discount price, variety, weight, target disease, usage dosage) and click to open a pre-filled WhatsApp enquiry link.

### Backend APIs (Public)
- **Visitor Tracking (`POST /api/visitor`)**: Log daily visits by IP address.
- **Enquiry Submission (`POST /api/enquiries`)**: Submit agricultural queries and stock requests from the client form to the store database.

---

## Technical Specifications
- **Framework:** Next.js 16 (App Router with Turbopack compilation)
- **Database ORM:** Prisma Client (SQLite local development, PostgreSQL ready for production)
- **SEO Elements:**
  - Automated dynamic sitemap at `/sitemap.xml`
  - Crawling rules and sitemap links at `/robots.txt`
  - Progressive Web App (PWA) manifest configurations at `/manifest.webmanifest`
  - Structured schema.org markup (Organization, LocalBusiness, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, Product JSON-LD) integrated on all pages.
  - High-priority Core Web Vitals optimizations (Image loading, responsive sizes attributes).
